name: Farmstead Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the waffle iron.
2. Melt the butter over low heat in a (1 quart) saucepan and set aside to cool.
3. Combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
4. Beat the buttermilk into the melted butter.
5. Beat in the eggs.
6. Mix the butter mixture into the flour mixture until just combined.
7. Ladle enough of the batter into the waffle iron to cover 2/3 of its surface.
8. Use a spatula to spread the batter evenly across the waffle iron.
9. Close the lid and cook until the steam stops, which should take about 5 minutes.
10. Open the lid and use a fork to carefully remove the finished waffle.
11. Repeat with the remaining batter.
